TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tomislav Nikolińá ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Tomislav Nikolińá, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Serbia ta' misuw hya' ga Tomislav Nikolińá, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: tomis~…ēla* nikoli* rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, tomis~…ēla* nikoli*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw s~…ēerő≤ia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a tomis~…ēla* nikoli*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Tomislav Nikolińá ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Tomislav Nikolińá, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Serbia ta' misuw hya' ga Tomislav Nikolińá, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: tomis~…ēla* nikoli* rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, tomis~…ēla* nikoli*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw s~…ēerő≤ia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a tomis~…ēla* nikoli*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
